name: defi-swarm-agents
description: Backend agent swarm — multi-tenant services that act on user EOAs via EIP-7702 delegation + session keys.

scripts.build: tsc -b shared api pm alm router executor marketplace
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b shared api pm alm router executor marketplace --noEmit
scripts.dev:all:logged: mkdir -p logs && concurrently -n api,pm,alm,router,executor,market -c cyan,green,blue,magenta,yellow,white "npm:dev:api 2>&1 | tee -a logs/api.log" "npm:dev:pm 2>&1 | tee -a logs/pm.log" "npm:dev:alm 2>&1 | tee -a logs/alm.log" "npm:dev:router 2>&1 | tee -a logs/router.log" "npm:dev:executor 2>&1 | tee -a logs/executor.log" "npm:dev:marketplace 2>&1 | tee -a logs/marketplace.log"
